issue: SKILL_BENCHMARK_RUN_OPTIONS forwards --profile, --state-log, --label, --grader, --k-runs that run-skill-benchmark.cjs never consumes. Dead-forwarding misleads operators about which args affect the run.
fix: Remove 'profile','state-log','label','grader','k-runs' from SKILL_BENCHMARK_RUN_OPTIONS, or implement missing handlers in run-skill-benchmark.cjs

issue: --advisor-mode is consumed by run-skill-benchmark.cjs (lines 71, 113-115) but absent from operator_guide.md and command file documentation
fix: Add [--advisor-mode=python] to documented invocation in operator_guide.md and command file

issue: default_profile.json ships weights but --profile option is never consumed by run-skill-benchmark.cjs (hardcoded WEIGHTS in score-skill-benchmark.cjs:22)
fix: Wire --profile loading in run-skill-benchmark.cjs or remove dead weights field from default_profile.json until implemented

issue: No drift: scoring_contract.md documents D1=25/D2=20/D3=15/D4=25/D5=15 which exactly matches score-skill-benchmark.cjs WEIGHTS constant
No drift: scored (D1-intra, D2, D3, D5) vs unscored (D1-inter, D4) dimensions in Mode A match scoring_contract.md and operator_guide.md
